mapper.select: SELECT t1.ID, t1.EQUIP_ID, t1.DATA_TYPE_CODE, t1.DATA_TYPE_NAME, t1.FILE_TABLE_ID, t1.REMARK, t1.CREATE_BY, t1.CREATE_BY_NAME, t1.CREATE_TIME, t1.UPDATE_BY, t1.UPDATE_BY_NAME, t1.UPDATE_TIME, t2.EQUIP_NAME, t2.EQUIP_SMALL_CATEGORY_NAME, t2.SPECIFIC_CODE, t2.MODEL_NUMBER, t3.MANUFACTURER, t4.FILE_NAME AS fileTableName, t4.BUSINESS_TYPE AS fileTableType FROM E_M_EQPT_FILE t1 LEFT JOIN E_M_EQPT_INFO t2 ON t1.EQUIP_ID = t2.ID LEFT JOIN E_M_EQPT_SUPPLY t3 ON t2.ID = t3.EQUIP_ID AND t3.DEL_FLAG = 0 LEFT JOIN SYS_FILE t4 ON t1.FILE_TABLE_ID = t4.ID WHERE t1.ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_M_EQPT_FILE ( ID, EQUIP_ID, DATA_TYPE_CODE, DATA_TYPE_NAME, FILE_TABLE_ID, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{equipId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{dataTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileTableId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE E_M_EQPT_FILE
EQUIP_ID = #{equipId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
DATA_TYPE_CODE = #{dataTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DATA_TYPE_NAME = #{dataTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
FILE_TABLE_ID = #{fileTableId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_TIME = #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
WHERE ID = #{id}
